item.title: First reading, referred to Ways & Means.
item.description: First reading, referred to Ways & Means.

item.title: 👍💵Aya Samman - Fourfront Contributor
item.description: Aya Samman signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Fourfront Contributor. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍Janet Carbary - Compass Health
item.description: Janet Carbary signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Compass Health.

item.title: 👍Tom Sebastian - Compass Health
item.description: Tom Sebastian signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Compass Health.

item.title: 👍💵Abby Moore - Washington Council for Behavioral Health
item.description: Abby Moore signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington Council for Behavioral Health. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍Shelby Nusbaum - Comprehensive Healthcare, Yakima
item.description: Shelby Nusbaum signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Comprehensive Healthcare, Yakima.

item.title: Passed to Rules Committee for second reading.
item.description: Passed to Rules Committee for second reading.
item.guid: 2026-03-02/Passed to Rules Committee for second reading.

item.title: First reading, referred to Finance (Not Officially read and referred until adoption of Introduction report).
item.description: First reading, referred to Finance (Not Officially read and referred until adoption of Introduction report).

item.title: Placed on second reading by Rules Committee.

item.title: Rules suspended. Placed on Third Reading.
item.description: Rules suspended. Placed on Third Reading.

item.title: Third reading, passed; yeas, 47; nays, 1; absent, 0; excused, 1.
item.description: Third reading, passed; yeas, 47; nays, 1; absent, 0; excused, 1.
